app-entry-points: Structure of the L1 entry points ptr_app / ptr_app_grid (thin wrappers over their *_components builders).
consumer-picker-seeding: Consumer (ppVar) picker seed/clear/redraw lifecycle: has_rendered latches, identity-based new-source clear, derived-column boot races, the seed_landed gate, producer-value timing.
formula-capture: How formula input is captured and normalized to a string at the public boundaries: rlang::enexpr + ptr_capture_formula deparse (expr_text width=500), string vs quoted-expression input, expr()/quote() language objects vs un-deparseable built ggplot objects, native-pipe |> desugaring; and ptr_shared()'s expression-input parity via normalize_shared_formulas.
harness-tooling: Claude-Code harness mechanics in this repo: /exec-plan & /decision-to-plan input contracts, the implementable pre-commit hook (incl. the *-plan.md glob), the generated symbol-lines.json manifest, worktree layout, tool-output batching artifact.
placeholder-registry-api: The placeholder registry + the three ptr_define_placeholder_* constructors: their args/validators (ptr_arg_*, positional_arg/ui_text_defaults), entry-record keys, runtime callable.
ppupload-mechanics: ppUpload / upload source specifics: fileInput reset flag, file<->text mutex, shortcut/companion textbox, env-load, auto-name, the resolve_upload_source helper.
r-name-normalization: Turning strings into syntactic R names: the column-vector vs single binding-name normalizers and the is_syntactic_name predicate.
refactor-discipline: Lessons for refactoring safely: automated dedup sweeps over-state duplication (run the deletion test before extracting), stale mocks break when a mocked fn gains an arg.
shared-coordinator-partition: Shared placeholders and the partition: panel vs formula-local ownership, coordinator host scope, the three ownership channels, snapshot/column-truncation rules.
shinytest2-gotchas: Browser e2e mechanics: app-dir+pkgload fixtures, child-process instrumentation, harness-blind native widgets, suspended renderUI pickers, false-green column traps.
source-binding-runtime: How data-source placeholders resolve and bind their frame at runtime: single-instance vs panel-host paths, the binder observers, binding-name derivation, state=NULL-at-host divergence.
test-gate-discipline: The authoritative full-suite gate: serial vs parallel, NOT_CRAN, baseline PASS counts, parallel boot-tail flakes in the seeding cluster, seeded-picker poll fixes.
ui-widget-construction: Static/renderUI widget building: the output-id container suffix, verb/stage param_override derivation, build_ui dispatch.
